rationale: Educ. Code §8.0531 governs review and adoption of instructional materials developed by regional education service centers. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Notwithstanding any other provision of this subchapter or Section 8.001(c), instructional lessons developed as part of a curriculum management system by a regional education service center, acting alone or in collaboration with one or more other regional education service centers, shall be subject to the same review and adoption process as outlined in Section 31.022.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
